# Suitsafari
## Good clothes, guaranteed.

Suitsafari connects customers with trusted local tailors via WhatsApp. Order custom shirts, pants, kurtas, and suits. Serving Latur, Maharashtra.

## How it works
1. Customer places order on website or via WhatsApp
2. System assigns nearest available tailor
3. Tailor receives order on WhatsApp with accept/reject buttons
4. Tailor stitches the garment
5. Customer picks up and pays directly to tailor

## Pricing
- Custom shirt: ₹400
- Custom pant/trouser: ₹500
- Kurta: ₹400
- Suit/Blazer: Contact for quote

## Contact
- Phone: +91 95791 71771
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919579171771
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/suitsafari_india
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/suitsafari.in
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/suitsafari-in

## API
- POST /api/orders - Create new order
- GET /api/orders - List orders (admin)
- GET /api/tailors - List active tailors
- POST /api/reviews - Submit a review
- GET /api/health - Health check

## Location
Latur, Maharashtra, India
